# 1099Deductions

> Complete guide to tax deductions for 1099 independent contractors and freelancers in the US 2026. Covers home office, mileage, health insurance, retirement, and all self-employment deductions.

## Key pages

- / : 1099 tax deductions guide 2026
- /home-office-deduction : Home office deduction for freelancers
- /mileage-deduction : Mileage deduction 72.5 cents/mile 2026
- /health-insurance-deduction : Self-employed health insurance deduction
- /retirement-deduction : SEP-IRA and Solo 401k deductions
- /phone-internet-deduction : Phone and internet tax deduction
